name: tripwire
description: Opinionated Claude Code hooks dispatcher. Blocks or rewrites dangerous commands; replies with actionable error messages.

scripts.build: bun build src/dispatch.ts --target=bun --minify --bytecode --outdir dist --entry-naming tripwire.js && bun build src/cli.ts --target=bun --minify --bytecode --outdir dist --entry-naming tripwire-cli.js && chmod +x dist/tripwire.js dist/tripwire-cli.js
scripts.check: bun run format && bun run lint:fix && bun run typecheck
